title: PokeFireBall
description: Replace the fireball texture with a pokeball!
body:
Tired of throwing boring orange fireballs? What if every fire charge felt like a Pokemon battle instead?

This resource pack replaces the fire charge texture with an iconic red and white Pokéball. Now every time you're loading up a dispenser, trading with piglins or sweating bedwars, you'll feel like a trainer stocking up for the Elite Four.

![Pokeball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25cae79e4f10890ec42a680e7ce94be60342a0e8.png)
